reasoning: Query asks for last-mile access to Shirakawa-go (buses, train transfers, timing). reasoning: Query wants Kamogawa sunset stroll + reasonable ryokan. Canonical landmarks block fires Kyoto signature spots; Kamogawa entries (Kamo River Canal, Kamo Delta, Kamogawa Park) are returned. reasoning: Hiroshima peace search returned Peace Memorial Museum, Peace Park, National Memorial Hall, Peace Flame, Peace Cathedral — solid landmarks.
